description_long: This is a round, single-tier cake with a light brown exterior, displayed on a white cake stand with purple handles. The cake features a square cutout in the center, revealing a filling or topping with a darker color and some visible texture, possibly nuts or fruit. There is white writing or decoration on the cake's surface, adding a personalized touch. The cake is placed on a wooden table, next to a gray embossed plaque or decorative item and a printed sheet. The overall appearance suggests a homemade or rustic style, with a focus on natural colors and simple presentation. The cake is the central focus, with the surrounding items providing context for a celebratory or casual gathering.
description: A round, single-tier cake with a light brown exterior and a square cutout center, displayed on a white cake stand with purple handles. The cake has white decorative writing and a rustic, homemade appearance.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full round cake, square cutout center, white writing, and the cake stand with purple handles.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cake's height, the thickness of the cake stand, and the edge of the wooden table.
description_view_2: Angled view showing the cake's side, the depth of the cutout, and more detail of the cake stand and table surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, emphasizing the cake's profile and the layered appearance of the cake and stand.
